name: Eurasia Groupe SA
summary: Eurasia Groupe SA owns and manages commercial real estate properties in France. It properties include stores/showrooms, warehouses, and offices. The company is also involved in real estate development activities. It also owns a hotel with 43 rooms. The company was formerly known as BONY SARL. Eurasia Groupe SA was founded in 1993 and is based in Aubervilliers, France.
